requirement_topic.en: Peru Market Access — Reglamento Tecnico Certification, In-Country Importer, Labelling and Customs
requirement_topic.zh: 秘鲁市场准入——技术规章认证、当地进口商、标签及通关
requirement_topic.zht: 秘魯市場准入——技術規章認證、當地進口商、標籤及通關

summary.en: Non-Peruvian manufacturers placing lithium batteries or power banks on the Peruvian market act through a Peru-established importer of record, which is the responsible party for compliance, customs clearance (typically via the Port of Callao under SUNAT customs), and post-market obligations. Key market-access elements: (1) Reglamento Tecnico certification — where PRODUCE/INDECOPI has issued a mandatory technical regulation covering the electrical product category, a certificate of conformity to the referenced NTP/IEC requirement, issued by an INACAL-accredited/recognised conformity assessment body, must be presented at import; many general electronics are not under a battery-specific Reglamento Tecnico, so applicability must be verified per HS code/category. (2) Energy-efficiency labelling — MINEM's Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica applies to products within its scope (mainly appliances); confirm whether a given charger/product is covered. (3) Consumer labelling — INDECOPI consumer-protection rules require product/importer identification and Spanish-language information. (4) MTC homologation for wireless models (see EMC/radio row). (5) Importer registration with SUNAT and applicable RAEE/solid-waste handling at distributor level (MINAM). There is no CE marking, no EU Authorised Representative regime, and no EU-style per-chemistry EPR registration for batteries.
summary.zh: 非秘鲁制造商将锂电池或移动电源投放秘鲁市场，须通过在秘鲁设立的进口商主体（importer of record）进行，该主体为合规、通关（通常经卡亚俄港在SUNAT海关下）及市场后义务的责任方。关键市场准入要素：（1）技术规章认证——当PRODUCE/INDECOPI已就该电气产品类别颁布强制性技术规章时，进口须出示由INACAL认可/承认的合格评定机构出具、符合所引用NTP/IEC要求的符合性证书；许多一般电子产品并不在电池专门技术规章之下，故须按HS编码/类别核实适用性。（2）能效标签——MINEM的能效标签（Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica）适用于其范围内产品（主要为家电）；须确认特定充电器/产品是否涵盖。（3）消费者标签——INDECOPI消费者保护规则要求标明产品/进口商信息及西班牙语资料。（4）无线型号的MTC核准（见EMC/无线电行）。（5）进口商在SUNAT注册，及分销商层面适用的RAEE/固体废物处理（MINAM）。秘鲁没有CE标志、没有欧盟授权代表制度，也没有欧盟式按化学体系的电池EPR注册。
summary.zht: 非秘魯製造商將鋰電池或行動電源投放秘魯市場，須透過在秘魯設立的進口商主體（importer of record）進行，該主體為合規、通關（通常經卡亞俄港在SUNAT海關下）及市場後義務的責任方。關鍵市場准入要素：（1）技術規章認證——當PRODUCE/INDECOPI已就該電氣產品類別頒布強制性技術規章時，進口須出示由INACAL認可/承認的合格評定機構出具、符合所引用NTP/IEC要求的符合性證書；許多一般電子產品並不在電池專門技術規章之下，故須按HS編碼/類別核實適用性。（2）能效標籤——MINEM的能效標籤（Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica）適用於其範圍內產品（主要為家電）；須確認特定充電器/產品是否涵蓋。（3）消費者標籤——INDECOPI消費者保護規則要求標明產品/進口商資訊及西班牙語資料。（4）無線型號的MTC核准（見EMC/無線電行）。（5）進口商在SUNAT註冊，及分銷商層面適用的RAEE/固體廢物處理（MINAM）。秘魯沒有CE標誌、沒有歐盟授權代表制度，也沒有歐盟式按化學體系的電池EPR註冊。

standards_or_laws: Reglamento Tecnico via PRODUCE / INDECOPI — mandatory certification where issued for the electrical product category (certificate of conformity to the referenced NTP/IEC)
INDECOPI — Codigo de Proteccion y Defensa del Consumidor (Ley No. 29571) — Spanish-language consumer/importer labelling
SUNAT — customs import registration and clearance (Port of Callao)
MINEM — Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica (energy-efficiency labelling) for products within scope; MINAM — RAEE/solid-waste handling (D.S. No. 009-2019-MINAM)

summary.en: China's domestic market access uses CCC (China Compulsory Certification, administered by CNCA/SAMR), mandatory for certain rechargeable battery categories sold domestically (e.g., mobile-phone lithium batteries are CCC-listed). CCC is a Chinese domestic requirement and is NOT recognised by Peru; it does not substitute for any Peruvian Reglamento Tecnico certificate, INDECOPI labelling, or MTC homologation. Chinese manufacturers do not appoint a foreign responsible operator for domestic sales, and there is no Chinese equivalent of the Peruvian importer-of-record + local conformity-certificate model for exporters. Domestic Chinese WEEE-style recycling is handled under the Regulations on the Administration of the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products, which applies within China only.
summary.zh: 中国国内市场准入采用CCC（中国强制认证，由CNCA/SAMR管理），对某些在国内销售的可充电电池类别为强制（如手机锂电池已列入CCC目录）。CCC属于中国国内要求，不被秘鲁认可，不能替代任何秘鲁技术规章证书、INDECOPI标签或MTC核准。中国制造商在国内销售时不任命外国责任运营商，对出口商也不存在等同于秘鲁进口商主体+当地符合性证书模式的对应制度。中国国内WEEE式回收由《废弃电器电子产品回收处理管理条例》处理，仅在中国境内适用。
summary.zht: 中國國內市場准入採用CCC（中國強制認證，由CNCA/SAMR管理），對某些在國內銷售的可充電電池類別為強制（如手機鋰電池已列入CCC目錄）。CCC屬於中國國內要求，不被秘魯認可，不能替代任何秘魯技術規章證書、INDECOPI標籤或MTC核准。中國製造商在國內銷售時不任命外國責任運營商，對出口商也不存在等同於秘魯進口商主體+當地符合性證書模式的對應制度。中國國內WEEE式回收由《廢棄電器電子產品回收處理管理條例》處理，僅在中國境內適用。

standards_or_laws: CCC — China Compulsory Certification (CNCA/SAMR) — domestic China market access only; not recognised in Peru
PRC Regulations on the Administration of the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products (2011, amended 2019) — domestic WEEE equivalent

gap.en: Compared with the EU lane, Peru's market access is lighter and importer-centric: (1) no CE marking and no EU Authorised Representative — instead a Peru-established importer of record carries compliance and customs (Callao/SUNAT); (2) certification is mandatory only where a Reglamento Tecnico applies to the category, so the first step is verifying applicability per HS code rather than assuming a battery-specific scheme; (3) Spanish-language consumer/importer labelling under INDECOPI is required; (4) no per-country, per-chemistry EPR battery registration — only general RAEE/solid-waste handling at distributor level under MINAM; (5) MINEM energy-efficiency labelling applies only if the product falls in its appliance scope. CCC does not transfer. Net: the exporter must secure a reliable Peru importer, confirm whether any Reglamento Tecnico forces a conformity certificate, arrange Spanish labelling, and handle MTC homologation separately for wireless models.
gap.zh: 与欧盟通道相比，秘鲁的市场准入更轻、以进口商为中心：（1）没有CE标志、没有欧盟授权代表——而由在秘鲁设立的进口商主体承担合规及通关（卡亚俄/SUNAT）；（2）仅当技术规章适用于该类别时认证才强制，故第一步是按HS编码核实适用性，而非假定存在电池专门方案；（3）须按INDECOPI提供西班牙语消费者/进口商标签；（4）没有逐国、按化学体系的电池EPR注册——仅有MINAM下分销商层面的一般RAEE/固体废物处理；（5）MINEM能效标签仅在产品落入其家电范围时适用。CCC不可转移。综上：出口商须确定可靠的秘鲁进口商、确认是否有技术规章强制要求符合性证书、安排西班牙语标签，并为无线型号单独处理MTC核准。
gap.zht: 與歐盟通道相比，秘魯的市場准入更輕、以進口商為中心：（1）沒有CE標誌、沒有歐盟授權代表——而由在秘魯設立的進口商主體承擔合規及通關（卡亞俄/SUNAT）；（2）僅當技術規章適用於該類別時認證才強制，故第一步是按HS編碼核實適用性，而非假定存在電池專門方案；（3）須按INDECOPI提供西班牙語消費者/進口商標籤；（4）沒有逐國、按化學體系的電池EPR註冊——僅有MINAM下分銷商層面的一般RAEE/固體廢物處理；（5）MINEM能效標籤僅在產品落入其家電範圍時適用。CCC不可轉移。綜上：出口商須確定可靠的秘魯進口商、確認是否有技術規章強制要求符合性證書、安排西班牙語標籤，並為無線型號單獨處理MTC核准。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory elements — Peru-established importer of record and SUNAT customs clearance; Spanish-language INDECOPI labelling; Reglamento Tecnico conformity certificate where the category is covered; MTC homologation for wireless models. No CE marking, no EU Authorised Representative, no per-chemistry EPR battery registration
mandatory_status.cn: CCC certification mandatory for domestically-sold products in applicable categories; no equivalent of Peruvian importer-of-record + Reglamento Tecnico certificate, INDECOPI labelling, or MTC homologation required of Chinese exporters under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Peru market access for Chinese lithium battery / power bank exporters is importer-centric and lighter than the EU. There is no CE marking and no EU-style authorised representative; a Peru-established importer of record carries compliance and Callao/SUNAT customs. Certification is mandatory only where a Reglamento Tecnico covers the category — verify applicability per HS code first. Spanish-language INDECOPI labelling is required, MTC homologation is needed for wireless models, and only general RAEE/solid-waste handling applies (no per-chemistry EPR). CCC does not transfer to Peru.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国锂电池/移动电源出口商的秘鲁市场准入以进口商为中心，比欧盟更轻。没有CE标志、没有欧盟式授权代表；由在秘鲁设立的进口商主体承担合规及卡亚俄/SUNAT通关。仅当技术规章涵盖该类别时认证才强制——须先按HS编码核实适用性。须提供西班牙语INDECOPI标签，无线型号需MTC核准，且仅适用一般RAEE/固体废物处理（无按化学体系EPR）。CCC不可转用至秘鲁。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國鋰電池/行動電源出口商的秘魯市場准入以進口商為中心，比歐盟更輕。沒有CE標誌、沒有歐盟式授權代表；由在秘魯設立的進口商主體承擔合規及卡亞俄/SUNAT通關。僅當技術規章涵蓋該類別時認證才強制——須先按HS編碼核實適用性。須提供西班牙語INDECOPI標籤，無線型號需MTC核准，且僅適用一般RAEE/固體廢物處理（無按化學體系EPR）。CCC不可轉用至秘魯。

source.publisher: INDECOPI — Instituto Nacional de Defensa de la Competencia y de la Proteccion de la Propiedad Intelectual (Gobierno del Peru)
